articles.title: Global Climate Summit Concludes with Landmark Agreements
articles.description: World leaders finalized agreements on carbon reduction targets, renewable energy investments, and sustainable development goals, aiming to limit global warming below 1.5°C.

articles.title: UK Prime Minister Visits India for Trade and Climate Talks
articles.description: The UK PM's official visit focused on trade agreements, climate cooperation, and cultural exchange programs between the two nations.

articles.title: Middle East Diplomatic Talks Resume
articles.description: Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Israel resumed high-level diplomatic discussions, focusing on regional trade and security agreements.

articles.title: Nigeria Presidential Debate Highlights
articles.description: Candidates for Nigeria's presidency debated economic reforms, security, and foreign policy in a live broadcast from Abuja, with millions watching nationwide.

articles.title: European Elections Round-Up
articles.description: Multiple EU countries head to polls this week, with key focus on climate policies, immigration, and economic recovery plans.

articles.title: US Congress Approves $500B Infrastructure Bill
articles.description: The bill will upgrade roads, bridges, and public transportation across the United States, creating jobs and modernizing infrastructure.

articles.title: Nigeria Business Confidence Rises
articles.description: Surveys indicate higher confidence in retail and manufacturing sectors, suggesting the Nigerian economy is gradually recovering.

articles.title: Global Markets React to Oil Price Fluctuations
articles.description: Stock exchanges in London, Frankfurt, and Paris saw fluctuations as crude oil prices rose unexpectedly, affecting energy and transport sectors.

articles.title: Tesla Expands Electric Truck Production
articles.description: Tesla will open new factories in Germany and the USA to produce more Cybertrucks, aiming to meet rising demand for electric vehicles.

articles.title: Microsoft AI Model Breakthrough
articles.description: Microsoft announces a new AI model capable of advanced natural language understanding, real-time translation, and creative content generation.

articles.title: Tech Startups in Lagos Raise $15M Funding
articles.description: Several Nigerian AI and fintech startups secured international investments at the Lagos Innovation Summit, attracting global investors.

articles.title: Apple Unveils iPhone 16 with AI Features
articles.description: Apple's new iPhone 16 includes advanced AI features, improved battery life, foldable display, and enhanced photography tools.

articles.title: NASA Plans Mars Rover Launch
articles.description: NASA prepares for a new rover mission to Mars, focusing on geological studies and searching for signs of past life on the Red Planet.

articles.title: UK Scientists Develop New Cancer Therapy
articles.description: Breakthrough treatment targets aggressive tumors with minimal side effects, currently undergoing clinical trials.

articles.title: EU Environmental Research Initiative Launches
articles.description: A multi-nation EU project will monitor climate change effects, biodiversity, and sustainable practices across Europe.

articles.title: Super Eagles Prepare for FIFA Qualifiers
articles.description: Nigeria’s national football team has started intensive training sessions ahead of the upcoming FIFA World Cup qualifying matches.

articles.title: Manchester United Secures Comeback Win
articles.description: In the Premier League, Manchester United defeated Arsenal 3-2 in a thrilling match with last-minute goals from Rashford and Bruno Fernandes.

articles.title: Real Madrid Dominates Barcelona in El Clasico
articles.description: Real Madrid won 4-1 at Santiago Bernabeu, with Benzema scoring a hat-trick and Vinicius Jr. adding the fourth goal.

articles.title: Liverpool Beats Chelsea in FA Cup Thriller
articles.description: Liverpool staged a dramatic comeback, winning 3-2 over Chelsea with late goals by Salah and Jota.

articles.title: Nigerian Film Festival Celebrates Local Talent
articles.description: Top Nollywood films were recognized at Lagos premiere events with awards for acting, directing, and screenplay.

articles.title: Netflix Announces New European Series
articles.description: Streaming giant Netflix is launching a historical drama series set in Paris, starring international actors, to premiere this summer.

articles.title: Spotify Expands Podcast Network to Europe
articles.description: Spotify is launching new localized podcasts in multiple European languages targeting tech, finance, and entertainment topics.

articles.title: Apple Announces Next-Gen MacBook Pro
articles.description: The new MacBook Pro comes with advanced AI-assisted productivity tools and improved battery life for professionals.
